Test Case: New org gets 99-day trial on first CRM access
Steps:
1. Create new org
2. User from that org accesses CRM for first time
3. Check org_subscriptions table
Expected Result:
Record created:
- trial_started_at = now()
- trial_ends_at = now() + 99 days
- status = 'trial'
- crm_first_accessed_at = now()

Test Case: Trial countdown banner shows days remaining
Steps:
1. User in trial (days remaining < 30)
2. Access any CRM page
Expected Result:
Banner appears at top:
- Shows X days left
- Amber/yellow styling
- View Pricing button

Test Case: No banner if trial > 30 days remaining
Steps:
1. User in trial with 50+ days left
2. Access CRM
Expected Result: No trial banner shown

Steps:
1. Trial with < 10 days remaining
2. Access CRM
Expected Result:
Banner shows:
- Red/warning styling
- ⚠️ icon
- Trial ends in X days!

Steps:
1. Org with trial ended 20 days ago
2. User tries to access CRM
Expected Result:
Access GRANTED
Banner shows:
- Trial expired — Subscribe
- Days since expiry shown

Steps:
1. In grace period
2. Login to CRM
3. Check org_subscriptions.login_count_since_trial_end
Expected Result: Counter incremented by 1

Steps:
1. login_count_since_trial_end = 4
2. Login (makes it 5)
3. View CRM
Expected Result:
Modal/banner shows:
Trial expired X days ago
Subscribe now prompt

Steps:
1. login_count = 3 or 6 or 7
2. Login
Expected Result: No special reminder (just banner)

Steps:
1. Org with trial ended 151 days ago
2. User tries to access CRM
Expected Result:
Access DENIED
Full-screen modal:
🔒 Trial Expired
View Pricing + Contact Admin buttons
Cannot access CRM at all

Steps: 1. Trigger expired modal
Expected Result:
Message includes:
- 150-day trial period ended
- Subscribe to continue
- Sales OS remains free

Steps:
1. In expired modal
2. Click Contact Administrator
Expected Result:
Opens email client:
To: muhammad.shaamel@gmail.com + @shaamelz.com
Subject: CRM Subscription Request
Body: Pre-filled template

Test Case: User limit enforced based on plan
Steps:
1. Org on Team Mini (max 3 users)
2. 4th user tries to login to CRM
Expected Result:
Access denied
Modal: User Limit Reached
Max 3 users for Team Mini plan

Test Case: Admin can see current user count
Steps:
1. Login as admin
2. View org settings or dashboard
Expected Result:
Shows: X/Y users
Where Y = max_users from plan

Steps: 1. Go to /pricing.html
Expected Result:
Page shows:
- 3 tiers (Mini/Midi/Maxi)
- Monthly/Yearly toggle
- B2B Outreach addon section
- FAQ
- Contact Admin buttons

Steps:
1. Toggle to Yearly
2. Check prices
Expected Result:
Prices update:
Mini: $100/yr
Midi: $195/yr
Maxi: $320/yr
Billing text: Billed yearly

Steps: 1. Click any Contact Administrator button
Expected Result:
Opens email with:
To: both admin emails
Subject: Get back to me...
Body: Template with placeholders

Steps:
1. Logged in user
2. Click Start 99-Day Trial on pricing page
Expected Result: Redirects to /checkout.html?plan=X&billing=Y

Test Case: Not logged in redirects to auth
Steps:
1. Not logged in
2. Click Start Trial
Expected Result: Redirects to auth.html with redirect params

Steps: 1. Access checkout with plan=team_midi&billing=yearly
Expected Result:
Displays:
- Team Midi
- $195/year
- Order summary
- Proceed to Payment button

Steps:
1. Select plan
2. Select B2B addon
3. Check total
Expected Result: Total = base + addon price

Test Case: Active subscriber has no trial banner
Steps:
1. Org with status='active'
2. Access CRM
Expected Result: No trial banner shown

Test Case: Active subscriber can exceed trial period
Steps:
1. Org subscribed (active) for 200+ days
2. Access CRM
Expected Result: Full access granted

Steps:
1. Org with status='past_due'
2. Access CRM
Expected Result:
Access granted
Warning banner: Payment overdue

Steps:
1. Org with status='cancelled'
2. Try to access CRM
Expected Result:
Access denied
Message: Subscription cancelled
